question: Which year from 2011-2016 has the lowest average traffic count across stations for Sioux Falls, South Dakota? Your response should be in the format [Answer].
practical_motivation: A transportation planner wants to know the lowest average traffic year in the early 2010s for a baseline comparison.

1.fact: Averaging station counts by year (Y2011-Y2016), the lowest average occurs in 2013 at 7928.310810810811.
1.subquestion: Which year from 2011-2016 has the lowest average traffic count across stations for Sioux Falls, South Dakota? (Average Y2011-Y2016 across all stations; select the minimum.)

reasoning_chain: Node 1: Which year from 2011-2016 has the lowest average traffic count across stations? (Average Y2011-Y2016 across all stations; select the minimum.) The answer is 2013.
